--- alter_table_alter_column_drop_on_update.sql
ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN bar DROP ON UPDATE

--- AST
&ast.AlterTable{
  Name: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  TableAlteration: &ast.AlterColumn{
    Alter: 16,
    Name:  &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 29,
      NameEnd: 32,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
    Alteration: &ast.AlterColumnDropOnUpdate{
      Drop:   33,
      Update: 41,
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN bar DROP ON UPDATE
